stages.name: additive schema
stages.precondition: Owner-supplied production fingerprint and zero unresolved REQUIRED_FOR_BETA shape conflicts
stages.expected_lock_risk: short metadata locks; exact estimate pending fingerprint
stages.compatibility_risk: existing application tables may differ from the L compatibility baseline
stages.idempotence: CREATE IF NOT EXISTS is insufficient by itself; object definitions must be fingerprint-compared
stages.rollback: drop only newly added graph/review objects after dependency verification

stages.name: constraints and indexes
stages.precondition: Additive tables exist and duplicate prechecks pass
stages.expected_lock_risk: index build and validation risk pending production row counts
stages.rerun_behavior: reuse exact matching objects; stop on mismatch
stages.rollback: drop only N-Q-owned indexes; do not weaken append-only or FK constraints

stages.name: RLS grants and RPC
stages.precondition: Production RLS, grants, and function fingerprint reviewed
stages.compatibility_risk: current production admin policies are unknown
stages.idempotence: exact policy and function definition comparison

stages.name: compatibility layer
stages.compatibility_risk: legacy admin actions currently mutate crawled_notices
stages.idempotence: exact source and canonical notice keys
stages.rollback: logical archive or compatibility link reversal without review event deletion

stages.name: review-to-public projection
stages.precondition: Production scholarship shape and provenance binding approved
stages.compatibility_risk: production provenance columns are not yet confirmed
stages.idempotence: same notice identity updates the same scholarship
stages.rerun_behavior: no-op when desired state already matches
stages.rollback: set is_verified/list_on_home false; preserve review history

stages.name: controlled backfill
stages.precondition: Backup verified, exact source cohort approved, dry-run duplicate count 0
stages.compatibility_risk: source seed and legacy identity collision
stages.idempotence: source external id or canonical detail URL
stages.verification: count reconciliation and unrelated row preservation
stages.rollback: logical archive or run supersession; physical delete only for unreviewed isolated run

stages.name: application cutover
stages.precondition: Canary success and public beta owner approval
stages.rollback: disable DB public read model and hide canary projections
